covered_sentences: Cathy stayed at Thrushcross Grange for five weeks, till Christmas.
By that time her ankle was healed and her manners were much improved.
When she came home, I expected a wild little savage without a hat to run in and hug us all so tightly we couldn't breathe.
But instead of that, a very dignified, handsome, well-dressed young lady appeared on the black pony.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Composition and camera: Left-right split panel, 1:2 ratio (left panel shows narrator expectation via cloud thought bubble, right panel is the main scene showing Cathy's actual arrival on horseback). Left panel: camera positioned at ground level slightly to the right, angled 20 degrees inward, looking toward the cloud bubble zone; front foreground has low heather brush edges. Right panel: camera positioned along the moorland path at mid-distance, angled 30 degrees left and slightly low, looking up toward the approaching rider; foreground has dry heather stalks and moss, mid-ground is Cathy on horseback, background shows winding path receding into rolling hills. Per-panel character budget: left panel 0 recognizable characters (silhouette only inside bubble), right panel 1 recognizable character.

Actions and relationships: Left panel: large cloud thought bubble occupying most of the panel; inside the bubble, a rough sketch silhouette of a hatless wild girl running with arms wide open toward the viewer, hair flying — silhouette only, not recognizable. Right panel: a teenage girl sits perfectly upright and composed on a black pony, back straight, chin gently lifted, hands resting elegantly on the reins; the black pony walks calmly along the path, head slightly lowered; the girl's posture radiates dignity and poise.

Scene: Moorland path leading toward Wuthering Heights, late December daytime; ground covered in low heather and moss in muted brown-purple tones; winding dirt path cuts through the heath; bare windswept shrubs on the left side of the path lean to the right; pale overcast winter sky; cool grey-blue ambient light.

Lighting and color: Cool overcast winter daylight, grey-blue sky; muted earth tones for the ground; the girl's pale elegant dress provides a warm focal contrast against the bleak landscape; overall palette desaturated with the figure as warm focal point.

Subjects and characters: Right panel — teenage girl about 16 years old, dark eyes bright and lively, dark brown mid-length hair neatly arranged, slender figure dressed in a pale or cream-colored elegant dress with fine pleated details, skirt reaching to ankles; seated on a black pony; her head height is roughly level with an adult's shoulder when standing beside the pony; the pony's back is approximately at adult waist height. Left panel: rough sketch inside bubble only, no character reference needed.

Style and medium: STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Constraints: Character appearance, costume details, and scene layout must strictly follow reference images with no modification; character proportions must remain consistent. No Chinese text in the image, no watermark, no extra figures, natural proportions, reasonable object sizes, clear spatial relationships. Panel divider is a single white thin straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels; no outer border on the overall image. No floating text, no caption text, no title text, no label text. Scene fingerprint: winding moorland path + low heather shrubs + windswept bare shrub leaning right, positions and forms unchanged. Character prohibitions: eyes must not change to light color; hair must not change to loose or curly; costume must not change to dark color; adult proportions must not be applied. Scale anchors: teenage girl seated on pony, head height approximately level with an adult's shoulder; pony's back approximately at adult waist height.

covered_sentences: "Cathy, what a beauty you are!" cried Hindley.
"She must be careful not to grow wild again now that she is home," said Frances.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Composition and camera: Three-panel horizontal sequence, equal-width panels. Left panel: camera positioned inside the stone courtyard at mid-distance, angled slightly right and low, looking up toward Hindley's face and upper body from below; stone arch edge in foreground. Center panel: camera positioned straight-on at mid-distance, Cathy and her black pony centered at the courtyard gate, camera at rider's eye level. Right panel: camera positioned slightly to the left of Frances, over-shoulder angle at mid-distance, looking toward Frances's face. Per-panel character budget: left panel 1 (Hindley), center panel 1 (Cathy on pony), right panel 1 (Frances).

Actions and relationships: Left panel: Hindley stands upright with arms slightly raised and spread, mouth open in an exclamation of delighted surprise, face turned toward Cathy; speech bubble: sketch of a smiling lady silhouette with the word "beauty" beside it. Center panel: Cathy sits poised on the black pony just inside the courtyard entrance gate, composed and graceful, a slight composed smile on her lips. Right panel: Frances stands with a prim upright posture, one hand raised in a cautionary gesture, looking toward Cathy; speech bubble: small house sketch with an inward arrow plus the word "wild" crossed with a red X, beside it the word "careful".

Scene: Wuthering Heights outer stone courtyard and entrance gate, daytime, late December; stone-paved ground with weeds in cracks; stone arch gate with carved inscription lintel visible; iron lamp post beside entrance; low stone walls; pale winter sky overhead.

Lighting and color: Flat cold winter daylight, pale grey-blue sky; stone walls in cool grey tones; Cathy's light-colored dress provides a warm focal accent against the grey stone environment; overall desaturated palette.

Subjects and characters: Hindley: adult male approximately 25-30 years old, light or dark brown short hair, tired rough-edged face, medium-tall build, old dark coat and trousers, slightly disheveled shirt; head at normal adult male height, stone gate arch rises clearly above him. Cathy: teenage girl about 16, dark bright eyes, dark brown mid-length neatly arranged hair, slender figure in pale cream elegant dress with fine pleated details, skirt to ankles; seated on black pony, head roughly level with an adult's shoulder. Frances: young woman 20-25, light brown or golden hair, pale face with bright eyes, slight slender figure in light or cream dress to ankle; head at normal adult female height.

Style and medium: STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Constraints: Character appearance, costume details, and scene layout must strictly follow reference images; no modification; proportions consistent. No Chinese text, no watermark, no extra figures. Panel dividers are single white thin straight lines, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gaps; no outer border. English text spelled correctly, no floating text outside bubbles, bubbles must not cover subjects; all English letters in handwritten style with natural irregular baseline, bold strokes, natural letter spacing. Scene fingerprint: stone arch gate with carved inscription + iron lamp post + irregular stone-paved courtyard, positions and forms unchanged. Hindley: hair color must not change to black, costume must not change to neat formal wear, no beard, no mustache. Cathy: eyes not to light color, hair not to loose or curly, costume not to dark, must not become adult tall proportions. Frances: eyes must not become dull, hair must not change to dark, costume must not change to dark. Scale anchors: Hindley's head at normal adult male height, stone gate arch clearly above him; Cathy's head roughly at adult shoulder height while seated on pony.

covered_sentences: Cathy kissed me very lightly indeed because I was covered in flour from making the Christmas cake, and she did not want to get her clothes dirty.
Then she looked around for Heathcliff.
Heathcliff," called Hindley, "come forward and greet Miss Catherine, like the other servants."
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Composition and camera: Left-right split panel, 1:1 ratio. Left panel: camera positioned at mid-room level to the right of the two figures, angled 30 degrees left, looking toward Cathy and Nelly near the kitchen entry; front foreground is the side edge of the large oak dresser. Right panel: camera positioned behind and slightly above Cathy's right shoulder, over-shoulder view looking across the main sitting room toward the far end; background shows the wide stone fireplace wall and the far corridor side door. Per-panel character budget: left panel 2 (Cathy + Nelly), right panel 1 (Cathy, recognizable from side/back).

Actions and relationships: Left panel: Nelly stands with flour visibly dusted on her dark housekeeper's dress and white apron, holding her floury hands slightly out to the sides; Cathy leans forward with pursed lips giving a very light peck toward Nelly's cheek while holding her arms back and away from her own dress to avoid flour contact; thought bubble near Cathy: small sketch of a white dress with a flour-cloud mark and a warning X beside it, labeled "flour". Right panel: Cathy stands in three-quarter view, head turned to the right scanning the room, expression alert and searching; a speech bubble from off-panel left (Hindley's direction) shows a servant's bow sketch with the words "Miss Catherine" and "come forward".

Scene: Wuthering Heights ground-floor main sitting room, daytime, late December; stone walls and columns, white stone-slab floor; large stone fireplace with iron grate visible on the right wall; large oak dresser with tin plates and silver jugs visible in the left-rear corner; thick wooden ceiling beams with hanging cured meats above; dark wood hard chairs in the middle of the room; the main door on the left leading to the stone courtyard. Nelly stands near the kitchen side entry, Cathy just inside the main door.

Lighting and color: Cool white winter daylight filtering through narrow deep-set windows; cool grey stone walls; warm amber glow from the fireplace on the right side; flour on Nelly's apron catches the light as a bright accent.

Subjects and characters: Cathy: teenage girl about 16, dark eyes, dark brown mid-length neatly arranged hair, slender, pale cream elegant dress with fine pleated details, skirt to ankles; head roughly at adult shoulder height; the oak dresser top is clearly above her head. Nelly: middle-aged woman 35-45, dark brown hair neatly pinned up, round kind face, sturdy medium build, dark housekeeper's dress with white apron dusted in flour; head at normal adult female height; door frame clearly above her head.

Style and medium: STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Constraints: Character appearance, costume details, and scene layout must strictly follow reference images; no modification; proportions consistent. No Chinese text, no watermark, no extra figures. Panel divider is a single white thin straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap; no outer border. English text spelled correctly, no floating text outside bubbles, bubbles must not cover subjects; all English letters in handwritten style. Scene fingerprint: stone fireplace on right wall with iron grate + large oak dresser with tin plates + thick wooden ceiling beams with hanging cured meats, positions and forms unchanged. Cathy: eyes not to light color, hair not to loose or curly, costume not to dark, proportions not adult-tall. Nelly: hair must not be loose or light-colored, white apron must remain and may show flour, costume main color must not change to light. Scale anchors: Cathy's head roughly at adult shoulder height; oak dresser top clearly above both characters; door frame above Nelly's head.

covered_sentences: He looked even dirtier and wilder than he had done before she left.
She ran up to him and kissed him seven or eight times, then she looked at him and laughed.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Composition and camera: Left-right split panel, 1:2 ratio (left panel shows Heathcliff approaching slowly, right panel — the main panel — shows Cathy kissing him and then laughing). Left panel: camera positioned at mid-room height slightly to the left of center, angled 20 degrees right, low-medium angle slightly upward emphasizing Heathcliff's sullen trudging approach; front foreground is the edge of a dark wood hard chair; background shows white stone floor and far stone wall. Right panel: camera positioned to the side at mid-distance, slightly elevated above the action, looking down at the two figures interacting near the center of the room; Cathy in laughing motion is the focal point; stone fireplace visible in background right. Per-panel character budget: left panel 1 (Heathcliff), right panel 2 (Cathy + Heathcliff).

Actions and relationships: Left panel: Heathcliff walks slowly forward with heavy reluctant steps, shoulders slightly slumped, expression dark and guarded; his clothes are visibly dirty — dark coat and trousers stained, shirt collar disheveled; dark eyes look down or slightly to the side; no speech bubble. Right panel: Cathy is caught mid-motion having just kissed Heathcliff; she steps back slightly with both hands still lightly on his shoulders; her expression is one of bright open laughter — mouth open, eyes crinkled with delight; Heathcliff stands stiff and uncertain, arms not raised to embrace, expression unreadable and slightly humiliated.

Scene: Wuthering Heights ground-floor main sitting room, daytime, late December; stone walls and white stone-slab floor; stone fireplace with iron grate visible on the right in the background; wooden ceiling beams with hanging cured meats above; dark wood chairs visible. Both characters near the center of the room.

Lighting and color: Cool winter daylight from narrow windows on the left; warm amber side-light from the fireplace on the right; the contrast between Cathy's light-colored elegant dress and Heathcliff's dark dirty clothing emphasizes their diverged circumstances.

Subjects and characters: Heathcliff: deep brown skin, short black slightly disheveled hair, black sharp deep eyes, tall sturdy build; dark coat and trousers visibly stained with dirt, shirt collar disheveled; head height clearly above Cathy's head by approximately one head. Cathy: teenage girl about 16, dark eyes bright, dark brown mid-length neatly arranged hair, slender, pale cream elegant dress with fine pleated details to ankles; head roughly at adult shoulder height; stone fireplace mantel well above her head. Relative scale: Heathcliff's head approximately one head taller than Cathy's.

Style and medium: STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Constraints: Character appearance, costume details, and scene layout must strictly follow reference images; no modification; proportions consistent. No Chinese text, no watermark, no extra figures. Panel divider is a single white thin straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap; no outer border. No floating text, no caption text, no title text, no label text in the image. Scene fingerprint: stone fireplace right wall with iron grate + white stone-slab floor + thick wooden ceiling beams with hanging cured meats, positions and forms unchanged. Heathcliff: hair color must not change to light, must not change to curly hair, costume main color must not change to light, must not change to short sleeves, no beard, no mustache; dirty disheveled appearance required. Cathy: eyes not to light color, hair not to loose or curly, costume not to dark, not adult-tall proportions. Scale anchors: Heathcliff's head approximately one head above Cathy's; door frame clearly above both characters.
